hero.name: João Guimarães
hero.card_bio: Web Designer · Developer · Marketing Strategist · Available for Freelance
hero.tagline: I build websites that convert visitors into clients — and brands that people remember.

projects.title: Cascais Volley Cup
projects.description: Full website for Portugal's largest international beach volleyball tournament — built for registrations, sponsors, and 600+ athletes across 50 teams.
projects.long_description:
Cascais Volley Cup is Portugal's largest international beach volleyball tournament, bringing together 50 teams and 600 athletes from 3 countries each summer. The event needed a platform that could handle team registrations, communicate with sponsors and federations, and project the credibility of an international competition.

I redesigned and rebuilt the site from the ground up — with a structured registration flow, clear sponsor placement, an accommodation portal via partner O-Sports, and a schedule and results section built for tournament week.

The result is a fast, professional platform the organization confidently shares with players, sponsors, press, and the volleyball federations.

projects.title: Koya's Bistro
projects.description: Website and online booking system for a bistro in Mercado de Carcavelos — wood-fired pizzas, craft cocktails, and a table reservation flow that converts.
projects.long_description:
Koya's Bistro is a café, bar and bistro located inside Mercado de Carcavelos, serving homemade food, tapas, wood-fired pizzas, and craft cocktails from 9am to midnight.

The owner needed a site that matched the warm, premium feel of the space and made it easy for customers to find hours, browse the menu, and book a table online.

I built a multilingual (EN/PT) site with a full menu section across 6 categories, an integrated table reservation system with date and time selection, Uber Eats integration, and a design that uses warm amber tones and serif typography to match the bistro's identity.

The result is a site that works as both a discovery tool and a direct booking channel.

projects.title: SorrisoPlus Dental Clinic
projects.description: Full website for a multidisciplinary dental clinic in Carcavelos — trust-focused design built around 20+ years of practice, 9 specialties, and 8,500+ patients.
projects.long_description:
SorrisoPlus is a multidisciplinary dental clinic in Carcavelos serving the greater Cascais area. With over 20 years of experience, 9 specialties, and 8,500+ patients, the clinic needed a site that communicated credibility and made it easy for new patients to book an appointment.

I built a multilingual (PT/EN) site structured around trust signals — team credentials, patient reviews (4.9 rating, 247 reviews), insurance providers, and advanced equipment (CBCT, intraoral scanner, laser, CAD/CAM). Each specialty has its own dedicated section to help patients find the right service quickly.

The site includes an appointment booking system with service selection, a contact form, WhatsApp integration, Google Maps, and an FAQ accordion — everything a new patient needs to go from discovery to booked.

about.bio:
I'm João Guimarães — a web designer, developer, and digital marketing strategist based in Portugal. I work with local businesses and growing brands that want to look credible online and attract more customers.

I started building websites out of curiosity, then turned that into a craft. Over the years I've combined design sensibility with technical depth and a genuine understanding of what makes people click, trust, and buy.

When I'm not working on a project, I'm usually exploring new tools, reading about brand strategy, or taking too long to make coffee.

contact.body: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Send me a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.form_success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
